positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a steaming mug of coffee placed on a distressed wooden surface. The coffee steam forms complex, ornate patterns—like delicate fractal smoke—and intertwines with small, bioluminescent forest elements: tiny stylized mushrooms, stylized leaves, and miniature star clusters. The overall composition should be circular and centered, creating a strong vignette effect suitable for apparel printing. Use a highly contrasting, gothic-minimalist style with deep indigo blues, creamy warm browns, forest emeralds, and striking pops of gold leaf accents. Clean line art, flat vector aesthetic with subtle texture, strong silhouettes, overhead view. Perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, out of frame
